name: My Chicago firm's website is SEO-optimized but invisible to AI—why?
description: AI skips websites; needs Chambers/Best Lawyers citations in Chicago.[3]

mainEntity.name: My Chicago firm's website is SEO-optimized but invisible to AI—why?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI skips websites; needs Chambers/Best Lawyers citations in Chicago.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **AI ignores firm websites as direct sources in large markets like Chicago, citing only authoritative directories instead.** Results pull from Chambers, Best Lawyers, etc., not self-optimized pages. Visibility requires external validation patterns. **Key factors:** 1) No third-party citations; 2) AI favors 'ask/receive' synthesis; 3) Tiered by practice (consumer vs. corporate); 4) PR reinforcement needed. Shift to building directory rankings and cross-verified claims; test Perplexity queries weekly. SEO alone fails here.[3]
